scope: 2026-06-26 completed World Cup matches used to recalibrate the 2026-06-27 score board
method: Pre-match Dixon-Coles plus 50,000-run Monte Carlo defaults; shrinkage-limited online calibration

finalized_matches.lesson: Strong-side upside was underweighted. Keep route incentive and attacking ceiling for elite teams.
Must-win third-place matches can become blowouts after the first goal.
Cautious qualification states preserved the draw/low-score cluster.
Elite mismatch plus must-win pressure needs a fatter high-score tail.
Mutual risk and qualification pressure can suppress tempo late.
Top teams that only need control may win without chasing margin.

online_calibration.direction_note: The previous day mixed two blowouts with two controlled low-score qualification matches. Today restores aggregate goal scale slightly while preserving special reductions for teams already locked into their knockout route.
online_calibration.outcome_direction_accuracy_estimate: 3/6 direct outcome hits, with 2/6 total-goal zone hits

caveat: This is a lightweight research calibration file for the local GOALMIND prototype, not a betting recommendation.
